name: speakai-mcp
description: Connect Codex to Speak AI for transcription, insights, and media management.

interface.shortDescription: Search and analyze Speak AI transcripts, recordings, clips, and insights.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Speak AI through MCP so it can work with your media library, transcripts, AI insights, clips, captions, folders, exports, automations, webhooks, and meeting assistant workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Speak AI to find the last 10 customer interviews that mention pricing, group the feedback by theme, and cite the source recordings.
Use Speak AI to summarize this week's team meetings into decisions, action items, owners, and unresolved risks.
Use Speak AI to pull exact customer quotes about onboarding friction from recent research calls and format them for a product brief.
Use Speak AI to analyze the latest sales calls and summarize objections, buying signals, next steps, and open questions.
Use Speak AI to find a strong 30-second highlight from the latest webinar, create a clip, and export captions.
